title: Annandale murder suspect's case postponed again
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The suspect accused of the...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The suspect accused of the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) reappeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 3 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The suspect accused of the murder of Heleen Annandale (62) reappeared in the Mossel Bay Magistrate's Court today, 3 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Sonwabile Mbambo (39) faces charges of murder and theft of a vehicle (Annandale's car was discovered abandoned in KwaNonqaba)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The case has been postponed once again to Friday 10 October, when his bail application is expected to be finalised.","html":"The case has been postponed once again to Friday 10 October, when his bail application is expected to be finalised."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Annandale's body was found in her flat in Crook Street near the Mossel Bay town centre on Monday 1 September, with a wound to the neck.","html":"Annandale's body was found in her flat in Crook Street near the Mossel Bay town centre on Monday 1 September, with a wound to the neck."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Medical personnel declared her dead on the scene.","html":"Medical personnel declared her dead on the scene."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Mbambo was arrested less than 48 hours afterwards. He will remain in police custody until his next court appearance.","html":"Mbambo was arrested less than 48 hours afterwards. He will remain in police custody until his next court appearance."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Previous articles:","html":"Previous articles:"},{"type":"list","items":["Woman found murdered in Mossel Bay flat","Vermoorde vrou se liggaam gevind nadat vriend haar as vermis aanmeld","Arrest made in Mossel Bay flat murder case"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Annandale murder suspect's case postponed again
